creator: dron_2@ua.fm
text:
Also got this issue.
- FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE-p3 clean install, samba36-3.6.23, nss_ldap-1.265_10
If I use "id" or "getent passwd" all ok, but whe try to log in to this samba server, auth failed ion messages - "nss_ldap: could not search LDAP server - Server is unavailable" and in LDAP server log - "TLS negotiation failure"
"net rpc join" works without any error.

I found this PR and try to install the same on FreeBSD 9
So -  FreeBSD 9.2-RELEASE #0 clean install, samba36-3.6.23, nss_ldap-1.265_10
config files copied from previous FreeBSD10 install. All ok, I can to log in to server without any problems.
